records.ety: [F. rein, pl. reins, fr. L. ren, pl. renes.]

defs: The kidneys; also, the region of the kidneys; the loins.
The inward impulses; the affections and passions; -- so called because formerly supposed to have their seat in the part of the body where the kidneys are.
quotes: My reins rejoice, when thy lips speak right things.
I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts.
